hero_desc: One membership — unlimited sport options. Explore every sport and activity we offer at Los Cab Sports Club.
swimming_text: Our heated 50-meter Olympic-size pool is among the finest in Orange County. Ideal for lap swimming, cross-training, lessons, or a refreshing workout in the sun.

swimming_features.title: 50-Meter Olympic Pool
swimming_features.desc: Heated year-round for comfortable swimming in any season.

swimming_features.title: Nova Swim School
swimming_features.desc: Professional swim lessons for children and adults at all skill levels.

swimming_features.title: Aqua Fitness Classes
swimming_features.desc: Low-impact water-based fitness classes included with membership.

swimming_features.title: 6-8 Water Polo Academy
swimming_features.desc: Structured youth water polo development for players ages 6–8.

swimming_features.title: Wading & Specialty Pools
swimming_features.desc: Separate pools for younger swimmers and specialized aquatic activities.

basketball_text: Los Cab features a full-size indoor basketball court that converts to two half-courts. Open gym is available daily, with organized programs led by Coach Beez.

basketball_features.title: Full-Size Indoor Court
basketball_features.desc: Converts to 2 half-courts for simultaneous games. Climate-controlled facility.

basketball_features.title: Daily Open Gym
basketball_features.desc: Open gym available each morning and evening. Note: closed Mon–Fri 3–9 PM for volleyball.

basketball_features.title: Coached by Coach Beez
basketball_features.desc: Organized basketball programs, drills, and skills sessions with experienced coaching.

volleyball_text: Los Cab is home to United Volleyball Club and offers both indoor and outdoor play. The indoor basketball court is converted for volleyball Mon–Fri evenings.

volleyball_features.title: United Volleyball Club
volleyball_features.desc: Home club to United Volleyball — organized competitive volleyball programming.

volleyball_features.title: Indoor Volleyball
volleyball_features.desc: Mon–Fri 3–9 PM on the converted basketball/volleyball court.

volleyball_features.title: Outdoor Play
volleyball_features.desc: Outdoor volleyball courts available for open play and organized events.

court_sports_subtitle: Los Cab offers one of the most complete court sport offerings on the West Coast.

court_sports.title: Handball — 8 Courts
court_sports.text: Los Cab features 8 handball courts with both concrete and glass walls — one of the premier handball facilities in Southern California. We regularly host national-level handball tournaments.

court_sports.title: Squash
court_sports.text: High-intensity squash play available at Los Cab. Orientation lessons available from our squash professional Sam Daye — perfect for newcomers and experienced players alike.

court_sports.title: Racquetball — 7 Courts
court_sports.text: Seven glass-back walled racquetball courts provide excellent visibility and play. Open play available throughout the day for all skill levels.

court_sports.title: Badminton — Relaunching July 2026
court_sports.text: The Los Cab badminton program is relaunching in July 2026 under the direction of Michael Do. Stay tuned for clinic schedules, leagues, and open play sessions.

cta_text: A single Los Cab Sports Membership gives you access to all these sports and more — plus the gym, pool, and group classes.
